pi_items.source: Task description (task.json line 5) and setup script (setup_task.sh line 15)
Matomo Reporting API Reference - VisitsSummary.get returns 'nb_visits' (Number of Visits)
Matomo Reporting API Reference - VisitsSummary.get returns 'nb_uniq_visitors' (Number of unique visitors)
Matomo Reporting API Reference - VisitsSummary.get returns 'nb_actions' (Number of actions including page views, outlinks and downloads)
Matomo Reporting API Reference - VisitsSummary.get returns 'nb_users' (Unique active users with known User IDs)
Matomo Reporting API Reference - VisitsSummary.get returns 'bounce_count' (Number of visits that bounced / viewed only one page)
Task specification (task.json metadata line 19) and verified against synthetic data population (populate_visitor_data.sh creates 5-20 visits per day for 60 days)
Task specification (task.json metadata line 20). CSV with 5+ rows and these columns would easily exceed 100 bytes in size.
Analysis of setup scripts: setup_task.sh (line 34-39) calls populate_visitor_data.sh which programmatically generates 60 days of fake visitor records with randomized metrics
Task description states 'Site ID: 1 (Initial Site)' and setup_matomo.sh (line 267) creates the Initial Site with idsite=1
Task description line 2 states password is 'Admin12345'. Setup_matomo.sh (lines 14-16) confirms these credentials are used during initial setup.
Task description (line 3) explicitly requires API token from admin user. Matomo documentation confirms VisitsSummary.get requires authentication token.
Setup_matomo.sh (line 281) sets version_core to '5.0.0' and references Matomo 5.x features
Verifier.py (line 20) states 'Pass threshold: 60 points' out of 100 total scoring points

privileged_info_summary: The task exports visitor summary analytics data via Matomo's VisitsSummary.get API endpoint with period=day for the last 30 days. The CSV output file is created at /home/ga/Documents/matomo_visitors_export.csv and contains verified Matomo metrics: nb_visits, nb_uniq_visitors, nb_actions, nb_users, and bounce_count. The task uses Site ID 1 (Initial Site) which is pre-configured in the Matomo environment. Data is synthetic, generated programmatically during environment setup covering 60 days of visitor records with 5-20 visits per day. Authentication uses an admin token obtained with credentials (username: admin, password: Admin12345). The verification threshold is 60 points out of 100, requiring the file to exist, be created during task execution, contain valid CSV headers, have at least 5 data rows, and minimum 100 bytes.
